v1_3k_sector_labeled_kernel_update.claim: BHSM v1.3K audits formal sector-labeled protected kernel construction and reports that the current Level 2 matrix does not protect the formal up/down kernel coordinates.

v1_3l_formal_kernel_operator_update.claim: Corrected finite-basis formal-kernel Level 2 scaffold; full H_T theorem remains open.
